channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Speaker race, Trump's second term, Carter funeral: January brings flurry of political events
item.description: New Year's Day ushers in a month of political events and milestones the likes of which Washington hasn't seen in a while.
item.dc:creator: Katie Wadington, NewsNation

item.title: Duchess Meghan Netflix series set for January premiere
item.description: Meghan, the Duchess of Sussex, has a Netflix series set for a mid-January premiere, the streaming service said in a post on the social media platform X on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, NewsNation

item.title: FBI says driver in New Orleans rampage acted alone and was '100%' inspired by Islamic State group
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — The Army veteran who drove a pickup truck into a crowd of New Year’s revelers in New Orleans acted alone, the FBI said Thursday, reversing its position from a day earlier that he likely worked with others in the deadly attack that officials said was inspired by the Islamic State g
item.dc:creator: ERIC TUCKER, JIM MUSTIAN, KEVIN McGILL and JACK BROOK, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: FBI releases new video of a suspect planting a pipe bomb near DNC offices on eve of the Capitol riot
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A harrowing chapter in American history remains shrouded in mystery: Who planted pipe bombs outside offices of the Democratic and Republican national committees in Washington on the eve of the attack on the Capitol? Hoping to generate new tips from the public, the FBI is releasing
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL KUNZELMAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 2 dead and 18 injured in Southern California plane crash
item.description: Police in Southern California say two people are dead after a small plane crashed through the roof of a sprawling furniture manufacturing building.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Man pushed onto NYC subway tracks recovering while suspect is charged with attempted murder
item.description: A man survived being shoved onto subway tracks ahead of an incoming train in New York City on New Year's Eve and is expected to fully recover, relatives said, while the person accused of pushing him was being held without bail Thursday on attempted murder and assault charges.
item.dc:creator: DAVE COLLINS, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: How to donate funds, blood after fatal Bourbon Street attack
item.description: As the City of New Orleans begins to recover from a fatal attack on Bourbon Street on New Year's Day, efforts are underway to help victims and their families.
item.dc:creator: Bella Dardano, Fox 5

item.title: John Capodice, actor who appeared in 'Ace Ventura,' 'Seinfeld' and more, dies at 83
item.description: News of Capodice’s death on Monday was publicly announced in an obituary posted by the Pizzi Funeral Home in Northvale, New Jersey.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Duchess Meghan returns to Instagram
item.description: (The Hill) -- Meghan, the Duchess of Sussex, announced her return to Instagram on New Year’s Day with a celebratory post on the beach. The former actress Meghan Markle jogged across the sand in an all-white outfit with her hair flowing in the wind before writing 2025 in the sand.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Vegas Cybertruck explosion driver ID'd as Army soldier from Colorado: Source
item.description: Livelsberger allegedly served at one point at the same military base as the man suspected of driving into a crowd in New Orleans.
item.dc:creator: Travis Harrison, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Soldier in Las Vegas Cybertruck explosion had gunshot wound to head: sheriff
item.description: The man who drove a Tesla Cybertruck that exploded outside of a Las Vegas, Nevada hotel has been identified as Matthew Livelsberger, an Army soldier from Colorado, a law enforcement source told NewsNation.
item.dc:creator: Travis Harrison, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump blames ‘open borders’ for New Orleans, Las Vegas attacks
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump blamed the situation at the U.S.-southern border for the recent attacks in New Orleans and Las Vegas, railing against President Joe Biden for his immigration policies as both cases are being investigated.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, KRON4

item.title: NYPD presence increased at Trump Tower, Times Square after attacks in New Orleans, Las Vegas
item.description: “While there are no immediate threats to our city at this time, out of an abundance of caution, we have heightened security and have increased NYPD presence at relevant locations"
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Cruise ship stomach bug illnesses hit 12-year high: CDC
item.description: Cruise ships saw the highest number of stomach bug illnesses since 2012 with 16 outbreaks impacting a total of 1,894 passengers.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, KRON4

item.title: Former top NYPD official's home searched amid allegations he demanded sex for overtime pay
item.description: Authorities searched the home of Jeffrey Maddrey, a former top NYPD official who resigned after being accused of demanding sex from a subordinate for overtime opportunities.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 10 people shot outside New York City nightclub on New Year's Day: NYPD
item.description: At least 10 people were shot outside a Queens nightclub on New Year's Day, according to the New York City Police Department.
item.dc:creator: Erin Pflaumer, Fox 5

item.title: Bomb-making materials found at New Orleans Airbnb potentially tied to Bourbon Street terrorist: report
item.description: A New Orleans Airbnb property where a fire broke out and bomb-making materials were found is reportedly linked to the Bourbon Street attacker.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump to hold DC rally day before inauguration
item.description: The president-elect has not held a rally in the District of Columbia since he delivered a speech on the Ellipse on Jan. 6, 2021, which preceded a violent attack on the Capitol by supporters attempting to stop the certification of the 2020 election results.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, KRON4

item.title: Biden awards the 2nd highest civilian award to leaders of the Jan. 6 committee and 18 others
item.description: President Joe Biden has awarded the second-highest civilian medal to Liz Cheney and Bennie Thompson, leaders of the congressional investigation into the Capitol riot.
item.dc:creator: Colleen Long, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: FBI says it thwarted apparent plot against AIPAC
item.description: Law enforcement arrested Forrest Kendall Pemberton after he allegedly traveled to Plantation, Fla., in search of AIPAC’s office with several firearms, including an AR-15 rifle.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, KRON4

item.title: FBI finds 150 homemade bombs at Virginia home in one of the largest such seizures, prosecutors say
item.description: The FBI said it believes it's the largest amount of homemade explosives it has encountered in its history
item.dc:creator: Sean C. Davis, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Have any New Year's resolutions? Here are some tips to help make them stick
item.description: Studies have shown that up to 70% of people who make New Year’s resolutions abandon those good intentions within months. Here are some tips for how to keep those resolutions when your willpower starts to falter.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Watch a replay of the 2025 Rose Parade presented by Honda
item.description: LA's Very Own KTLA 5 is proud to offer this replay of the 136th Rose Parade presented by Honda from New Year’s Day, Jan. 1, 2025. The theme of the 136th Rose Parade was “Best Day Ever!” Billie Jean King, a sports icon and equality champion, was the parade's Grand Marshal.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, ABC 4

item.title: 7 rising Democratic leaders to watch
item.description: Democrats are scrambling for a new leader to head the party and organize resistance to President-elect Trump following Vice President Harris’s loss in November's election.
item.dc:creator: Jared Gans, Fox 5

item.title: Islamic State-inspired driver expressed desire to kill before deadly New Orleans rampage, Biden says
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — A U.S. Army veteran driving a pickup truck that bore the flag of the Islamic State group wrought carnage on New Orleans’ raucous New Year’s celebration, killing 15 people as he steered around a police blockade and slammed into revelers before being shot dead by police.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Multiple people injured in balloon-drop incident at Massachusetts arcade
item.description: Cheers of excitement quickly changed to horror when the netted balloons pulled a large display down onto the crowd below, including multiple children, Storyful reports.
item.dc:creator: Jeremy Tanner, WGN 9

item.title: FDA testing aged raw cow's milk cheese for bird flu
item.description: Raw, unpasteurized milk is a known vector of bird flu when derived from infected cow herds. It can also contain pathogens such as E. coli, salmonella, and both Streptococcus and Staphylococcus bacteria.
item.dc:creator: Joseph Choi, KRON4

item.title: Excessive screen time leads to more anger, outbursts for preschoolers
item.description: Young children spending more than 75 minutes on a tablet were more likely to show increased outbursts of anger and frustration, a new study has found.
item.dc:creator: Kate Rix - The 74, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Nearly all of Puerto Rico is without power on New Year's Eve
item.description: A blackout hit nearly all of Puerto Rico early Tuesday as the U.S. territory prepared to celebrate New Year’s, leaving more than 1.3 million clients in the dark. Officials said it could take up to two days to restore power.
item.dc:creator: DÁNICA COTO Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Judge denies sentencing delay for ex-Sen. Bob Menendez but puts his wife's trial off until February
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Former New Jersey Sen. Bob Menendez will be sentenced on corruption charges as scheduled at the end of January, and his wife’s trial will be moved from January to February, a judge said Monday. U.S. District Judge Sidney H.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: UnitedHealthcare taught us ways to deny claims: Former employee
item.description: Collins described crying at her desk while handling calls from desperate patients, as supervisors laughed.
item.dc:creator: Damita Menezes, WFLA, NBC

item.title: South Korea struggles to find cause of plane crash that killed 179
item.description: South Korean officials said Monday they will conduct safety inspections of all Boeing 737-800 aircraft operated by the country's airlines as they struggle to determine what caused a plane crash that killed 179 people a day earlier.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: These glasses let you 'see' conversations in real time
item.description: When I heard about AI glasses that let you "see" what people are saying, I was skeptical. But after trying them on, I was proven wrong.
item.dc:creator: Rich DeMuro, WGN 9
